title: Final warmup
description: Calm focus before the big finish
text: One lesson left, my little hero. Take a breath. Sit up tall. Place your fingers on home row. Find F and J by feel. The next lesson is your certificate exam. You can do it!

character_tips.anna: Last warmup. Breathe. You've trained for this.
character_tips.maxim: Final warmup. Body and mind ready.
character_tips.klavochka: One breath away from your crown, my hero 👑🌸
